message:
Revert "refactor: remove legacy multi-crate structure — delete frankenterm-core, frankenterm-gui, frankenterm-alloc, frankenterm-mux-server, and frankenterm-mux-server-impl"

This reverts commit 832c7536bd64cdee66645d341e6630ff605a9dc9.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenterm-alloc"
+description = "Allocator and per-pane arena helpers for FrankenTerm"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+readme = "../../README.md"
+keywords = ["allocator", "jemalloc", "frankenterm"]
+categories = ["development-tools"]
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[features]
+default = []
+jemalloc = ["dep:tikv-jemallocator", "dep:tikv-jemalloc-ctl"]
+
+[dependencies]
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tikv-jemallocator = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+tikv-jemalloc-ctl = { workspace = true, optional = true }

@@ -0,0 +1,61 @@ +{ + "_comment": "Pre-computed embedding fixtures for deterministic semantic anomaly testing. No ONNX/network required. Bead: ft-344j8.10", + "vectors": { + "rust_compile": { + "label": "Compiling main.rs", + "embedding": [0.9, 0.1, 0.05, 0.02, 0.01, 0.01, 0.0, 0.0], + "expected_entropy_bpb": 3.8 + }, + "java_npe": { + "label": "java.lang.NullPointerException at com.example.Main.run(Main.java:42)", + "embedding": [0.01, 0.02, 0.8, 0.9, 0.05, 0.01, 0.0, 0.0], + "expected_entropy_bpb": 4.2 + }, + "build_progress": { + "label": "Building... 42% [########## ]", + "embedding": [0.85, 0.12, 0.06, 0.03, 0.01, 0.01, 0.0, 0.0], + "expected_entropy_bpb": 2.1 + }, + "html_404": { + "label": "404 Not Found

Not Found

", + "embedding": [0.0, 0.0, 0.01, 0.01, 0.02, 0.05, 0.9, 0.8], + "expected_entropy_bpb": 4.5 + }, + "test_passed": { + "label": "test result: ok. 42 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored", + "embedding": [0.3, 0.1, 0.05, 0.02, 0.5, 0.3, 0.01, 0.0], + "expected_entropy_bpb": 4.0 + }, + "spinner": { + "label": "⠋ Loading... ⠙ Loading... ⠹ Loading...", + "embedding": [0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01], + "expected_entropy_bpb": 1.5 + } + }, + "test_scenarios": [ + { + "name": "stable_then_orthogonal_shift", + "description": "30 Rust compile observations then a Java NPE (orthogonal context)", + "stable_vector": "rust_compile", + "stable_count": 30, + "shift_vector": "java_npe", + "expected": "anomaly_detected" + }, + { + "name": "stable_then_similar", + "description": "30 Rust compile observations then a build progress (similar context)", + "stable_vector": "rust_compile", + "stable_count": 30, + "shift_vector": "build_progress", + "expected": "no_anomaly" + }, + { + "name": "stable_then_html_404", + "description": "30 Rust compile observations then HTML 404 (completely orthogonal)", + "stable_vector": "rust_compile", + "stable_count": 30, + "shift_vector": "html_404", + "expected": "anomaly_detected" + } + ] +}

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
